text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One peaceful day, with the Twinkle Series behind
us...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho gets to fulfill her long-awaited wish
of showing her grandmother around the academy.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Welcome to my school!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Everything's just how I remember!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for arranging everything, Trainer. I was
impressed you went so far as to think about my
transportation as well.
choice_data_list: It was no trouble at all.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. Don't stand there all day, Grandma! There's
so much I wanna show you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: Oh, is that right? I wonder what it could be...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You'll just have to wait and see! Hehe, this way! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Look, Grandma! These are my apprentices!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: My, Sweepy! You've taken on apprentices?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's right. C'mon, everyone! Show Grandma
some respect!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: H-hello! It's a pleasure to meet you!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: It's lovely to meet you.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what?! Since when are we all your
apprentices?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Vodka! Shhh! Her grandmother is here to visit.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She's trying to look good for her, so show a little
awareness and help her out!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey! Pipe down over there, you two!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that's wonderful, Sweepy! It takes
tolerance truly befitting a teacher to cultivate
such vivacious students.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy to see you all getting along so well.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Uh, yeah! Of course! And...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's enough chitchat! Next, I want us all
to put on a race for Grandma!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Familiar! Show Grandma to the best seat in the
house!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... It looks like Sweepy has made a lot of
good friends.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: ...I don't have to worry anymore.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes. I was so worried whether or not she
would fit in when she first started. She gets so
anxious around strangers and has no filter.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
I was worried the others might get the wrong idea
about her.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
But it looks like there was nothing to worry about.
She has so many wonderful people around her.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Hi, Sweep. Are you all training together today?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Do you wanna join? We're about to
have a one-lap race!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...A race.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I'll go get changed right away! I want
to beat you, after all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Really?! Rob Roy is running too?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm not ready to go up against two of the
strongest runners I know! I need advance warning!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is somebody scared? I'm feeling totally fine
over here.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh. I'm the one who's gonna win the Derby,
after all. Racing those two should be a great
warm-up!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hey, it's not just you! I have goals too, you kn—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Daiwa Scarlet glances at Sweep Tosho.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hm? What is it?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hey, now! If you don't stop that fighting, I'll have
to whack you one!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... I'm... good to go!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Already?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Okay, everyone, get into position! Ready, set...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Go!

text_block_list.name: Scarlet and Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I wiiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That acceleration was insane...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh! We've got an emergency! Vodka,
get on my back! I'll take you to the infirmary!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
H-hold on, Kawakami! You can relax. I think she
just had a buildup of lactic acid.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Heeheehee! You've certainly gathered an
interesting bunch of apprentices, Sweepy!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Duh, Grandma! It's me we're talking about!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Everyone still has a long way to go, but that's why
I'm giving them plenty of training!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear. Your training sounds quite unforgiving. I
hope your apprentices don't run off on you.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Wait. Scarlet! Are you thinking of running off?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wh-why are you singling me out?! Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But... hypothetically speaking, I don't think that a
Sweep apprentice would be the type to run off.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She's very kind and, more importantly, she's
someone that you can respect.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I want to win a Grand Prix too. I also want to put
on a great race that will stand out vividly in
people's memories. Just like she did.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
I see. It looks like Sweepy really does have an
apprentice.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Do you really have to go already?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: Sad as it is, it appears my train has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
But there's no need to be distressed. Why don't
you come visit me next time?

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Feel free to bring your trainer and all your friends
and apprentices as well. Bring the whole gang!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Really?! Are you sure?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I'll make sure to keep the house nice
and tidy.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
From now on, you need to oversee the growth of
racing magic in order to cultivate the skills of
your apprentices.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
You've changed the world through your racing
magic. That girl earlier felt it. Being a witch means
taking responsibility and seeing things through to
the end.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hm? ...Okay.
choice_data_list: We'll pass her style on to the next generation.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha... I'm counting on you, Trainer. I can rest
easy knowing you'll be here with her.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
I'll see you soon, Sweepy. Until then, you enjoy
every moment here to the fullest.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Of course! Hehe, see you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho's grandmother keeps looking back
and nodding politely.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And Sweep Tosho and I wave back each time.
